message:
fix: six correctness fixes across btree, MVCC, VDBE, and io_uring VFS

B-tree fixes:
- cell.rs: cell size calculation correction for on-page payload
  measurement, ensuring defragmentation doesn't corrupt cell boundaries
- cursor.rs: cell on-page size now accounts for the cell pointer entry
  itself during defragmentation, preventing off-by-one page corruption

MVCC fixes:
- ssi_validation.rs: evidence size estimation now counts bytes instead
  of words, fixing over-allocation that could cause the SSI validator
  to reject valid transactions under high contention
- witness_publication.rs: cycle detection rewritten with proper 2-node
  and 3-node cycle handling; previous implementation could miss short
  cycles in the dependency graph, leading to phantom deadlocks

VDBE engine optimizations and fixes:
- engine.rs: MemTable key lookups changed from linear scan to
  binary_search_by_key(), providing O(log n) instead of O(n) for
  sorted ephemeral tables used in subquery materialization
- vectorized_agg.rs: empty GROUP BY input now correctly returns a
  single row with aggregate defaults (e.g. COUNT(*)=0), matching
  SQLite's documented behavior per §2.2 of lang_aggfunc.html

io_uring VFS fix:
- uring.rs: short read loop now correctly retries until the full
  requested byte count is satisfied or EOF is reached, preventing
  partial page reads on high-IOPS NVMe devices where the kernel
  may split large reads across multiple completions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
